siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 6 at 40 percent. Strength: Romanian Deadlift (RDL), 4 by 10 at 40 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 15 minutes: 6 Deadlift 80/60, 12 Wall Ball 9/6, 15 KB Swing 24/16. For hypertrophy, focus on upper back, biceps, shoulders.
